from typing import Dict, Any

class UserService:
    def __init__(self, api_url: str, analytics: Any, cache: Any) -> None:
        self.api_url = api_url
        self.analytics = analytics
        self.cache = cache

    def get_user(self, user_id: int) -> dict:
        import requests
        response = requests.get(f"{self.api_url}/users/{user_id}", timeout=30)
        return response.json()

class Analytics:
    def track(self, event: str, data: dict) -> None:
        import requests
        requests.post("https://analytics.example.com/events", json={
            "event": event,
            "data": data,
        }, timeout=10)

class Cache:
    def __init__(self, redis_url: str) -> None:
        import redis
        self.client = redis.from_url(redis_url)

    def get(self, key: str) -> Any:
        return self.client.get(key)

    def set(self, key: str, value: Any, ttl: int = 3600) -> None:
        self.client.set(key, value, ex=ttl)

def calculate_shipping(weight: float, rate: float, tax_rate: float) -> float:
    return weight * rate * (1 + tax_rate)
